# Bastion: Project Structure

**Status**: Draft | **Version**: 0.1 | **Part of**: [Bastion Design Spec](README.md)

---

## Generated by `forge new`

```bash
forge new my_app
```

Produces:

```
my_app/
├── forge.toml                          # Project configuration
├── src/
│   ├── my_app.march                    # Application entry point
│   ├── my_app/
│   │   ├── endpoint.march              # Request pipeline (middleware composition)
│   │   ├── router.march                # Pattern-matched routes
│   │   ├── handlers/                   # Request handler modules
│   │   │   └── page_handler.march
│   │   ├── components/                 # Shared template components
│   │   │   └── layout.march
│   │   ├── islands/                    # WASM island modules
│   │   │   └── counter.march
│   │   ├── channels/                   # WebSocket channel handlers
│   │   │   └── user_socket.march
│   │   └── contexts/                   # Domain logic / Depot query modules
│   │       └── accounts.march
│   └── templates/                      # Template files (optional, can also inline ~H)
│       ├── layout.march.html
│       └── pages/
│           └── home.march.html
├── priv/
│   ├── static/                         # Static assets
│   │   ├── css/
│   │   ├── images/
│   │   └── islands/                    # Compiled WASM (generated by forge build)
│   └── depot/
│       └── migrations/                 # Database migrations
├── test/
│   ├── my_app_test.march
│   ├── handlers/
│   └── islands/
└── config/
    ├── config.march                    # Base config
    ├── dev.march                       # Development overrides
    ├── test.march                      # Test overrides
    └── prod.march                      # Production overrides
```

---

## Application Entry Point

```march
mod MyApp do
  import Bastion

  fn start() do
    children = [
      {Depot.Pool, MyApp.Config.db()},
      {Bastion.PubSub, name: MyApp.PubSub},
      {Bastion.Endpoint, MyApp.Endpoint, port: 4000}
    ]

    Bastion.Supervisor.start_link(children, strategy: :one_for_one)
  end
end
```

---

## Minimal Endpoint

```march
mod MyApp.Endpoint do
  import Bastion.Middleware

  fn call(conn) do
    conn
    |> Bastion.Middleware.static("/static", from: "priv/static")
    |> Bastion.Middleware.logger()
    |> Bastion.Middleware.parse_body()
    |> Bastion.Middleware.load_session(MyApp.Config.session())
    |> Bastion.Middleware.Depot.with_pool(MyApp.Repo.pool())
    |> MyApp.Router.route()
  end
end
```

---

## Complete Application Example

A minimal but complete Bastion application showing all the pieces working together:

```march
# src/my_app.march
mod MyApp do
  import Bastion

  fn start() do
    children = [
      {Depot.Pool, MyApp.Config.db()},
      {Bastion.PubSub, name: MyApp.PubSub},
      {Bastion.Endpoint, MyApp.Endpoint, port: 4000}
    ]
    Bastion.Supervisor.start_link(children, strategy: :one_for_one)
  end
end

# src/my_app/endpoint.march
mod MyApp.Endpoint do
  import Bastion.Middleware
  import Bastion.Security

  fn call(conn) do
    conn
    |> Bastion.Security.SSL.force_ssl()
    |> Bastion.Security.Headers.defaults()
    |> Bastion.Security.CSP.default_policy()
    |> Bastion.Middleware.max_body_size(1_048_576)
    |> Bastion.Middleware.static("/static", from: "priv/static")
    |> Bastion.Middleware.RequestID.assign_request_id()
    |> Bastion.Middleware.Logger.log_request()
    |> Bastion.Middleware.parse_body()
    |> Bastion.Middleware.load_session(MyApp.Config.session())
    |> Bastion.Security.CSRF.protect()
    |> Bastion.Middleware.Depot.with_pool(MyApp.Repo.pool())
    |> MyApp.Router.route()
  end
end

# src/my_app/router.march
mod MyApp.Router do
  import Bastion.Conn

  fn route(conn, :get, []) do
    posts = MyApp.Blog.recent_posts(conn.assigns.db, 10)
    conn |> render(MyApp.Templates.Home, %{posts: posts})
  end

  fn route(conn, :get, ["posts", slug]) do
    case MyApp.Blog.get_by_slug(conn.assigns.db, slug) do
      Ok(post) -> conn |> render(MyApp.Templates.Post, %{post: post})
      Error(:not_found) -> conn |> send_resp(404, "Not found")
    end
  end

  fn route(conn, :get, ["api", "posts"]) do
    posts = MyApp.Blog.recent_posts(conn.assigns.db, 20)
    conn |> json(posts)
  end

  fn route(conn, :get, ["static" | path]) do
    Bastion.Static.serve(conn, path)
  end

  fn route(conn, _method, _path) do
    conn |> send_resp(404, "Not found")
  end
end
```
